title: Fix overlap between 'Find local pest technicians' icon and headings

requirements.summary: Fix the overlapping issue between the 'Find local pest technicians' icon and the headings in the LocationFinder component by adding proper spacing or layout adjustments
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Find local pest technicians' icon does not overlap with any headings
All text remains fully readable without obstruction
The layout maintains proper visual hierarchy and spacing

file_operations.description: Adjust the layout spacing and positioning in the LocationFinder component to prevent overlap between the 'Find local pest technicians' icon and headings. Add appropriate margins, padding, or flexbox gap properties to ensure proper visual separation. Maintain the existing map functionality and shadcn/ui component structure while fixing the layout issue.
